title: How to How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya: The Complete Creator Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Kenya, struggling to sell your ebooks because your bank restricts international transactions, and PayPal or Stripe won't work for you. You've tried every possible solution – local payment gateways, cryptocurrencies, even manual bank transfers – but nothing seems to stick. Your sales are stagnant, and your passion for creating is dwindling. It's time to break free from these limitations and tap into the vast global market that's been inaccessible to you until now.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The reason why traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe won't work for you is because of the Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations that govern their operations. These regulations require you to verify your identity, which can be a hurdle for creators in various countries, including Kenya. Our approach, on the other hand, uses blockchain-based payments that don't require KYC, allowing you to sell your ebooks freely without worrying about verification issues.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need a few basic tools: a computer with an internet connection, a digital creator platform like Gumroad or Sellfy, and our Full Stack Bundle solution that integrates with NOWPayments, a cryptocurrency payment processor. Don't worry if you're not tech-savvy; our bundle is designed to be user-friendly, and our support team is always available to guide you through the process.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline involves a few simple steps. First, create an account on our platform and install our Full Stack Bundle solution. Next, configure your payment settings to use NOWPayments, and set up your ebook delivery pipeline to automate the process of sending your ebooks to customers upon payment. Finally, customize your store's design and layout to reflect your brand's identity.
Don't let KYC regulations hold you back from selling your ebooks globally.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and start selling your ebooks. Promote your store through social media, email marketing, and other channels to attract potential customers. As sales start rolling in, make sure to track your analytics to see what's working and what areas need improvement. With our solution, you can start selling your ebooks within hours, not days or weeks.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

The Full Stack Bundle brings together every component needed to build a global digital store: the Core Shop Engine for backend payment verification and automated delivery, Web3 Wallet Connect for the buyer-facing checkout experience, and the Admin Dashboard for transaction tracking and order management. For creators in restricted markets, this is not a luxury — it is the minimum viable infrastructure for a professional digital business. The bundle includes a deployment guide, priority updates, and Discord support. Total cost is a one-time payment of $79.99. There are no monthly fees, no percentage cuts on sales, and no platform relationship that can be terminated by someone else's compliance decision.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

Will I need to have a PayPal or Stripe account to use your solution? No, our solution uses blockchain-based payments through NOWPayments, so you don't need any traditional payment processor accounts. Can I sell ebooks in other formats, like PDF or EPUB? Yes, our solution supports various file formats, including PDF, EPUB, and MOBI. Can I use my existing ebook platform, like Gumroad or Sellfy? Yes, our Full Stack Bundle solution integrates with various platforms, including Gumroad and Sellfy.
Our Full Stack Bundle solution is designed to be user-friendly, even for non-tech-savvy creators.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking to sell more than just ebooks, consider using our Full Stack Bundle to create a digital product store that accepts various cryptocurrencies. Our solution is not limited to ebooks; you can sell software, fonts, presets, templates, and other digital products as well. To learn more about accepting cryptocurrency payments, check out our comprehensive guide to blockchain-based payments.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a concrete checklist to get you started: Create an account on our platform and install the Full Stack Bundle solution. Configure your payment settings to use NOWPayments. Set up your ebook delivery pipeline to automate the process of sending ebooks to customers. Test your store's payment and delivery pipeline using a test ebook. Promote your store through social media and email marketing. Monitor your analytics to track sales and optimize your store's performance.
You can start selling your ebooks within hours, not days or weeks, using our solution.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
